languages.original_text: "I see no colours coming from Nuncius... Is treating servo-skulls like living beings some kind of sacred practice among the Tech-Priests?"

languages.text: "Я не вижу каких-либо цветов, исходящих от Нунциуса... Общаться с сервочерепами как с живыми — это некая сакральная практика техножрецов?"
"I see no colours coming from Nuncius... Is treating servo-skulls like living beings some kind of sacred practice among the Tech-Priests?"

languages.text: "Ich sehe keine Farben, die von Nuncius ausgehen ... Ist es irgendeine heilige Praxis der Techpriester, Servoschädel wie lebende Wesen zu behandeln?"
languages.original_text: "I see no colours coming from Nuncius... Is treating servo-skulls like living beings some kind of sacred practice among the Tech-Priests?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich sehe keine Farben, die von Nuncius ausgehen ... Ist es irgendeine heilige Praxis der Techpriester, Servoschädel wie lebende Wesen zu behandeln?"

languages.text: « Nuncius n'émet aucune couleur... Est-ce que traiter les servocrânes comme des êtres vivants est une pratique répandue parmi les technoprêtres ? »
languages.original_text: "I see no colours coming from Nuncius... Is treating servo-skulls like living beings some kind of sacred practice among the Tech-Priests?"

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius n'émet aucune couleur... Est-ce que traiter les servocrânes comme des êtres vivants est une pratique répandue parmi les technoprêtres ? »

languages.text: “我从努恩修斯身上看不出任何色彩……将伺服头骨当作活物对待，是技术神甫某种神圣的习俗吗？”
languages.original_text: "I see no colours coming from Nuncius... Is treating servo-skulls like living beings some kind of sacred practice among the Tech-Priests?"

traits.locale_text: “我从努恩修斯身上看不出任何色彩……将伺服头骨当作活物对待，是技术神甫某种神圣的习俗吗？”

languages.text: «No veo que emanen colores desde Nuncius... ¿Tratar a los servocráneos como seres vivos es alguna práctica sagrada de los tecnosacerdotes?».
languages.original_text: "I see no colours coming from Nuncius... Is treating servo-skulls like living beings some kind of sacred practice among the Tech-Priests?"

traits.locale_text: «No veo que emanen colores desde Nuncius... ¿Tratar a los servocráneos como seres vivos es alguna práctica sagrada de los tecnosacerdotes?».

languages.text: "ヌンシウスからは何の色も見えないが...。サーボ・スカルを生き物のように扱うのは、技術神官たちの間で神聖な習慣なのか？"
languages.original_text: "I see no colours coming from Nuncius... Is treating servo-skulls like living beings some kind of sacred practice among the Tech-Priests?"

languages.text: "Nuncius renksiz... Hizmeletlere canlı varlıklarmış gibi davranmak, Tekno Rahiplerin yürüttüğü kutsal bir uygulama mı?"
